memoryArtifacts.headline: Death
memoryArtifacts.description: Taken prisioner at battle of Shrewsbury and beheaded as a traitor.

zh.Hatton in Waverton, Cheshire, England: 英國爾哈頓 在 瓦維頓
zh.Harlaston, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾哈盧亞斯頓
zh.Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾哈登 霍爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Vernon, II於1370年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾時，他的父親Richard de Vernon I30歲，母親Juliana de Pembridge21歲。他於1382年5月20日與Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon在英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈登 霍爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年9月8日在英國斯塔福爾哈盧亞斯頓享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Vernon, II于1370年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾哈登 霍爾时，他的父亲Richard de Vernon I30岁，母亲Juliana de Pembridge21岁。他于1382年5月20日与Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon在英国英格兰德比夏爾哈登 霍爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年9月8日在英国斯塔福爾哈盧亞斯頓享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Vernon, II was born in 1370, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Vernon I, was 30 and his mother, Juliana de Pembridge, was 21. He married Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon on 20 May 1382, in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 8 September 1400, in Harlaston, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Vernon, II est né en 1370, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Vernon I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Juliana de Pembridge, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon le 20 mai 1382, à Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 septembre 1400, à Harlaston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Vernon, II 1370 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Vernon I 30 und seine Mutter Juliana de Pembridge 21. Er hat am 20. Mai 1382 in Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. September 1400 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Harlaston, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Vernon, II è nato il nel 1370 nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard de Vernon I, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Juliana de Pembridge, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon il 20 maggio 1382, nel Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 settembre 1400, nel Harlaston, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハル
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernon, IIが1370年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルで生まれた時，父Richard de Vernon Iは30歳，母Juliana de Pembridgeは21歳であった。1382年5月20日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアハッドオン ハルでJohanna ferch Rhys Vernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1400年9月8日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアハーラストンで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Vernon, II(이)가 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하던 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Vernon I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana de Pembridge(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1382년 5월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 하던 홀에서 Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 9월 8일 영국 스태퍼드실르 하를라스턴에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Vernon, II nasceu em 1370, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard de Vernon I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Juliana de Pembridge, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon em 20 de maio de 1382, em Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de setembro de 1400, em Harlaston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Vernon, II родился в 1370 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard de Vernon I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana de Pembridge, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon 20 мая 1382 г. в местности хаддон холл, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 сентября 1400 г. в местности харластон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Vernon, II nació en 1370, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard de Vernon I, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Juliana de Pembridge, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Johanna ferch Rhys Vernon el 20 de mayo de 1382, en Haddon Hall, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de septiembre de 1400, en Harlaston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
